message:
chore: update internal packages for REST API compatibility

Minor adjustments across packages to support the new REST endpoints:

- assign/reservation.go: Export reservation check methods
- cli/locks.go: Use consistent error handling
- handoff/transfer.go: Add context parameter for timeout support
- handoff/transfer_test.go: Update tests for new signature
- summary/generator.go: Export generator interface
- watcher/file_reservation.go: Add status accessors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -232,5 +232,10 @@ func (m *FileReservationManager) RenewReservations(ctx context.Context, agentNam
 		return nil
 	}
 
-	return m.client.RenewReservations(ctx, m.projectKey, agentName, extendSeconds)
+	_, err := m.client.RenewReservations(ctx, agentmail.RenewReservationsOptions{
+		ProjectKey:    m.projectKey,
+		AgentName:     agentName,
+		ExtendSeconds: extendSeconds,
+	})
+	return err
 }

@@ -460,7 +460,11 @@ func runRenewLocks(session string, extendMinutes int) error {
 	defer cancel()
 
 	extendSeconds := extendMinutes * 60
-	err = client.RenewReservations(ctx, wd, agentName, extendSeconds)
+	_, err = client.RenewReservations(ctx, agentmail.RenewReservationsOptions{
+		ProjectKey:    wd,
+		AgentName:     agentName,
+		ExtendSeconds: extendSeconds,
+	})
 
 	result := RenewResult{
 		Session:       session,
